name: AutoPilotRuleContract

args.name: payment
args.desc: Payment to cover box storage costs

returns.desc: Unique identifier for the created rule

methods.name: execute_rule
methods.desc:
Execute an AutoPilot rule
This method executes a single swap for the rule. For multiple assets, this should be called multiple times (can be grouped).
Expected atomic group: [0] Payment/AssetTransfer from user to this contract (asset_in) [1] App call to this method

methods.name: update_rule_status
methods.desc: Pause, resume, or cancel a rule

methods.name: delete_rule
methods.desc: Delete a rule and reclaim box storage MBR

args.name: new_fee_bps
args.desc: New fee in basis points (max 1% = 100 bps)

methods.name: opt_in_asset
methods.desc:
Opt the contract into an asset (admin only)
This is required before the contract can receive and hold ASAs

args.name: paused
args.desc: True to pause, False to unpause

desc:
AutoPilot Rule Engine for automated trading strategies
    
    Enables users to create automated trading rules that execute
    when specific market conditions are met.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: First txn must be asset transfer
First txn must be payment for ALGO
OnCompletion must be NoOp && can only call when not creating
